taskTitle: Study the meaning and conditions of La ilaha illAllah
subtaskTitle: Understand what it means to worship Allah alone without partners
csQueryPrompt: For a MILOS subtask titled 'Understand what it means to worship Allah alone without partners' under the parent task 'Study the meaning and conditions of La ilaha illAllah' (module: faith_shahada_core), propose exactly 2 NotebookLM queries to a Quran/Hadith primary-source corpus: (1) Quran-biased — name likely primary ayat that directly or contextually anchor this subtask; (2) Hadith-biased — name likely Sahih hadith (Bukhari/Muslim preferred) that directly or contextually anchor this subtask. Return the queries inside a <queries></queries> block as a numbered list, each one sentence, ready to paste into a retrieval system. Do NOT answer the queries — query formulation only.
extractedQueries: Retrieve primary Quranic verses (Arabic and English) that directly or contextually establish: Understand what it means to worship Allah alone without partners
Retrieve Sahih hadith (Bukhari/Muslim preferred) with grade that directly or contextually establish: Understand what it means to worship Allah alone without partners
